description_long: This is a straight, wooden ladder with two parallel side rails and seven evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The ladder is constructed from rectangular wooden beams, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The rungs are flat and wide enough to provide stable footing, and the side rails extend slightly beyond the top and bottom rungs. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, and the wood has a matte, slightly rough finish. The overall color is a uniform light brown, typical of untreated or lightly finished wood. This ladder would commonly be found in urban environments such as garages, construction sites, or for maintenance work on buildings.
description: A straight, wooden ladder with seven evenly spaced rungs and rectangular side rails, finished in light brown. It has a sturdy, traditional design with no visible safety features.
description_view_0: The ladder is seen from an elevated angle, showing the depth of the rungs and the thickness of the side rails.
description_view_1: A side perspective highlights the profile of the side rails and the spacing between the rungs.
description_view_2: A direct front view displays all seven rungs and the full length of the ladder.
description_view_3: An angled view reveals the ladder's symmetry and the extension of the side rails beyond the rungs.
